evidence.excerpt: Type: Bug With a copilot license, pasting text is extremely slow, sometimes I have to wait 5-6 secs before vscode shows the pasted text (~5 normal lines of code). It shows some spinning icon. It looks like syntax highlighting (when typing text) is also lower priority than copilot processing. This happened since the last update got installed. VS Code version: Code 1.110.0 (0870c2a0c7c0564e7631bfed2675573a94ba4455, 2026-03-04T01:20:28.863Z) OS version: Windows_NT x64 10.0.22631 Modes:
Author: pbaksa

I ran `restart to update` on insiders, vscode closes and I see the Windows error message

```
---------------------------
Visual Studio Code
---------------------------
Failed to install Visual Studio Code update.

Updates may fail due to anti-virus software and/or runaway processes. Please try restarting your machine before attempting to update again.

Author: mikelward
